full_text:
Yan Liang 顏良
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yan Liang (顏良). A fierce general in service under Yuan Shao. Beheaded by Guan Yu. Yan Liang was affiliated with Yuan Shao. Yan Liang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
